name: phpstorm-mcp
description: Agent skill for using PhpStorm MCP tools in PHP projects.

interface.shortDescription: Route PHP project work between PhpStorm MCP and terminal tools.
interface.longDescription: Helps agents use PhpStorm MCP for IDE-owned PHP project context, inspections, quick fixes, refactoring, execution, Composer runtime checks, database probes, and safe IDE action discovery.
defaultPrompt: Use the PhpStorm MCP skill to work in this PHP project. Refresh the active PhpStorm project configuration, route semantic IDE work through MCP, use terminal tools where they are more deterministic, and validate any changes.
